title: First battle of Ossus

{{Quote|We just lost the Tibanna colonies on Bespin, Ossus will fall within days.|Mace Windu|<ref name="Game" />}}
In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]],<ref name="TNEC" /> a '''battle''' took place on<ref name="Game" /> the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Ossus/Legends|Ossus]] between Republic and Separatist forces. Following an [[Attack on Bakura|attack]] on the Republic world [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]],<ref name="Game" /> [[Confederacy military/Legends|Separatist forces]] advanced with the intent to take control of the Republic-aligned world.<ref name="TNEC" /> While also discussing [[Battle of Bespin (Clone Wars)|battles at Bespin]] and [[Battle of Rhen Var|Rhen Var]], [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Mace Windu/Legends|Mace Windu]] of the [[Jedi High Council/Legends|Jedi High Council]] stated to fellow Master [[Yoda/Legends|Yoda]] that Ossus would fall within [[Standard day/Legends|days]].<ref name="Game" /> Ossus did eventually fall into Separatist control.<ref name="TNEC" /> The [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances]] [[Historian/Legends|historian]] [[Voren Na'al/Legends|Voren Na'al]] mentioned the Separatist taking of Ossus in his historical archive, [[The New Essential Chronology (in-universe)|''The New Essential Chronology'']], published in [[36 ABY]].<ref name="TNEC" />

==Behind the scenes==
The battle at Ossus was first mentioned in the [[2002]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] [[Star Wars: The Clone Wars (video game)|''Star Wars: The Clone Wars'']], developed by [[Pandemic Studios]] and produced by [[LucasArts]] as part of the [[Clone Wars multimedia project|''Clone Wars'' multimedia project]].<ref name="Game" />
